productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Flower Turquoise Blue Wallet
description: Crafted for the urban style maven, this wallet from lino perros is a must have for those who love organizing their wallet space. Dimensions : 9 cm X 19 cm Synthetic leather upper with a foldable upper flap with a press button closure Synthtethic leather flower motif on the upper flap Two main compartments One more main compartment with a steel clasp Five card holders and one id card pocket One main pocket on the inside of the flap Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
